name: Rathnavel Sutheshika
raw_text: AI/ML Engineer Rathnavel Sutheshika 0772770454 sutheshikasuthe@ gmail.com LinkedIn GitHub Aspiring AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience in developing intelligent systems, predictive models, and computer vision applications. Experienced in Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Preprocessing. Passionate about leveraging AI technologies and data-driven insights to solve real-world problems and continuously expand technical expertise in a dynamic internship environment. Education Institute of technology University of Moratuwa Jun 2023 - present National diploma in technology in Information technology Kandy Girls High School GCE Advanced level - Feb 2022 Physical science stream GCE Ordinary level - Passed with 9As Dec 2019 Technologies and Languages Programming Language Python, Java, SQL, JavaScript, Dart Frameworks Libraries OpenCV, TensorFlow, Keras , Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas AI Expertise Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Artificial Neural Networks (ANN), Natural Language Processing (NLP) Data science Data Preprocessing, Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, Data Visualization Foundation Statistics, Linear Algebra Projects Attendance system with Face recognition GitHub Repository Developed a Python-based attendance system leveraging OpenCV and Deep Learning. Implemented Haar cascade face detection and OpenFace embeddings for accurate face recognition. Automated attendance recording by storing recognized faces in a CSV database with real-time updates. Diabetes Prediction Using Neural Networks GitHub Repository Developed a machine learning model using Keras and TensorFlow to predict diabetes based on patient health parameters. The model was trained on the Pima Indians Diabetes Dataset, achieving high accuracy through a multi-layer neural network. Implemented model serialization to save and reload trained models for future predictions. Real-time Motion detector using computer vision GitHub Repository Developed a Python application using OpenCV and Imutils to detect and highlight moving objects from a live webcam feed. Implemented frame differencing and contour detection techniques for motion tracking, useful for surveillance and activity monitoring. Email Spam Detection using NLP GitHub Repository Developed an NLP-based email spam detection system using Python and machine learning. Applied text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF for feature extraction and trained classification models. Evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, and recall for reliable spam classification. Skills Problem solving Analytical thinking System thinking Collaboration Communication Time management AI Big data fluency Leadership Extracurricular Activity Member of the Zero plastic club of NDT Member of Nature club of university of Moratuwa Community Outreach Volunteer Visited remote schools to distribute educational supplies (books, pens, pencils) and conducted educational seminars for students, participated in animal welfare activities, including rescuing and providing care for street dogs and cats. Additional Information Languages English (fluent), Tamil (Native), Sinhala (fluent) Availability Immediate availability for internship opportunities References 1. Mrs.A.U.P.Athukorala Head of Division, Information Technology Institute of technology, University of Moratuwa Email uthpalap@itum.mrt.ac.lk Phone 0112124000 2. Ms. Sithara Madhubhashini Lecturer (Probationary ), Department of Electrical and Information Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna Email sithara.m@eie.ruh.ac.lk Phone 0717055905 .
